narrative:
Washington Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 528 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
